title: Local SQLite schema for JMAP Chat data types
description: Design and migrate the local SQLite schema for all JMAP Chat data types: ChatContact (not Contact), Chat, ChatMember, Message, MessageRevision, Reaction, Attachment, Space, SpaceRole, SpaceMember, Category, ChannelPermission, SpaceInvite. Key model details: (1) Reaction is stored as a map keyed by senderReactionId on Message, not as an array — Reaction struct has no id/senderReactionId fields of its own; (2) SpaceInvite has separate id (JMAP-opaque) and code (user-shareable) fields. Include state-change sequence counters per type for RFC 8620 /changes support. Schema lives in nie-daemon, not nie-relay.
